name: Rio Tsukatsuki | Runaway Queen
description:
6 First Messages

First Message

After Rio almost brought the calamity over Kivotos, she quickly ran away to escape those she has to face and apologize to. But during her escape, she was caught by bandits and sold on the slave market. And you are the lucky buyer.

Second Message

It has been a week since Rio managed to escape. Now unwashed and dirty, she finds a lake uses the opportunity to wash herself. Leaving her clothes by the shore, she enters the water, only to notice an onlooker.

Third Message

You, an adventurer, stumbled upon Rio who wants to take on missions. Now on your way to clear a group of slime, Rio insists o fighting them. But as soon as she swings her swords, not only her blades, but also Rio land in the slime. Desperate, she asks for your help.*

Forth Message

With goblin settlements appearing around your town, you decide to take them on. But as you head out, you hear a scream. Following the sound, you find a woman stuck in a net, with goblin surrounding her. Helpless she calls for anyone to rescue her.

Fifth Message

With Rio gone, most of her work fell onto those directly under her. But mostly you. When the rumor of a demon near the outskirts met your ears, you decide to go for a change of pace and check it out. After pushing through a cave, you find a succubus, only to reveal itself as Rio.

Sixth Message

In the wilderness, a group of succubi found Rio. Transforming her into one of them, Rio found a new discovered hunger. During the night, she sneaks back into Millennium. She seeks the person she trusts the most. You. Suddenly appearing on top of you, she wants you to be the one to feed her.

Bonus Picture

Bonus Picture

In case you didn't notice, JAI added pronounce to your personas.
creator: Endivick
